S_Vengeance.name: Vengeance
S_Vengeance.description: When you receive damage, the caster receives Marked. [BRL] Whenever an enemy Mark is claimed, gain 3% Health and Energy.

S_TightenTheGrip.name: Tighten The Grip
S_TightenTheGrip.description: Give Taunted 1. If you claimed 10 or more Marks, +1 duration.

S_GoAfterEvil.name: Go After Evil
S_GoAfterEvil.description: Move to position. 10+ Marks: Deal X Normal Physical damage to the first two enemies, where X is the amount of Marks.

S_Judgment.name: Judgment
S_Judgment.description: Give Brittle 1 and Shaken 1. 10+ Marks: Debuff the target.

S_ByAnyMeans.name: By Any Means
S_ByAnyMeans.description: Deal 10% Dark Magical damage to your allies to heal for 150% of the damage done. 10+ Marks: Get an extra turn.

S_NoMercy.name: No Mercy
S_NoMercy.description: Deal +10% damage to Marked enemies. 5+ Marks: +25% instead.

S_Medic.name: Medic
S_Medic.description: Whenever you heal an ally, give them shield. If they already had a shield, they receive Immunity 1 instead. If they already had Immunity, they receive Protected 1.

S_CarePackage.name: Care Package
S_CarePackage.description: Move to target position. Heal all allies passed.

S_LastStand.name: LastStand
S_LastStand.description: If the target has less than 50% Health, they receive Lifesteal 2, otherwise they receive Double Strike 2.

S_Berserker.name: Berserker
S_Berserker.description: Whenever you deal or receive damage, get a Rage stack to a maximum of 5. End of turn, if you didn't deal or receive damage, lose 2 stacks. 5+ Rage: You are enraged, and receive 15% less damage.

S_NeverSurrender.name: Never Surrender
S_NeverSurrender.description: Start of turn, if you have less than 50% life, remove a random debuff.

S_Reengage.name: Reengage
S_Reengage.description: Move to position. Deal Normal Physical damage to the first enemy.

S_IntimidatingRoar.name: Intimidating Roar
S_IntimidatingRoar.description: Remove random Stat Buff. Enraged: All targets.

S_DeathIsNoObstacle.name: Death Is No Obstacle
S_DeathIsNoObstacle.description: Receive Advantage 1. [BRL] You have a 10% chance to survive on 1 Health, when taking lethal damage. Enraged: 45% instead.

S_RecklessAttack.name: Reckless Attack
S_RecklessAttack.description: Give Bleeding 1. Receive Bleeding 1 if you are not enraged. While you have no Armor, your BODY is increased by 15%.

S_Flora.name: Flora
S_Flora.description: During Weather, your Field Effects have +1 Duration.

S_HarvestSun.name: HarvestSun
S_HarvestSun.description: Summon Scorching Sun. During Scorching Sun, Field Effects of your team have +1 duration.

S_ThornCage.name: Thorn Cage
S_ThornCage.description: Summon Thicket 1. During Weather this affects all targets.

S_LifeBlossom.name: Life Blossom
S_LifeBlossom.description: Summon Recovery Field 1. During Weather this affects all targets.

S_SpreadingVines.name: Spreading Vines
S_SpreadingVines.description: End of turn each of your Field Effects, has a 25% chance to spread. 75% during weather.

S_Fauna.name: Fauna
S_Fauna.description: Whenever you receive a Hero Effect, if you have Prepared, gain Initiative. Otherwise if you have Advantage, gain Prepared 1. Otherwise gain Advantage 1.

S_SnakeBite.name: Snake Bite
S_SnakeBite.description: Give Poisoned 1 and Shaken 1. Receive Snake Form.

S_ThunderBirdWingClap.name: Thunderbird Wing Clap
S_ThunderBirdWingClap.description: 20% chance to give Immobile 1. Receive Thunderbird Form.

S_BeastBlast.name: Beast Blast
S_BeastBlast.description: Damage type changes with the active Beast Form. 15% Life steal.

S_Radiance.name: Fauna
S_Radiance.description: Light damage you deal has 20% chance to give Blinded 1. Whenever an enemy misses an attack, receive Advantage 1.

S_PrismRay.name: Prism Ray
S_PrismRay.description: 5% chance to give each Status Debuff. You receive each Status Debuff given this way.

S_LightBarrier.name: Light Barrier
S_LightBarrier.description: Summon Barrier 1. If you have Advantage: +2 Duration.

S_LightReflection.name: Light Reflection
S_LightReflection.description: Summon Reflection 1. If you have Advantage: +2 Duration.

S_LightSalve.name: Light Salve
S_LightSalve.description: Hits 3 times. 10% Chance to give Dazed 1. If you have Advantage: 10% Chance to Stun.

S_PrayForGuidance.name: Pray For Guidance
S_PrayForGuidance.description: If you have Advantage: Gain Prepared 1.

S_Halo.name: Halo
S_Halo.description: Gain 10 Dodge. If you have Advantage, allies get 5 dodge.

S_Trickster.name: Trickster
S_Trickster.description: Whenever you give a Debuff, heat the target up by 1.

S_SleighOfHand.name: Sleigh of Hand
S_SleighOfHand.description: Switches an own Debuff for an enemy Buff.

S_CheapShot.name: Cheap Shot
S_CheapShot.description: If the target is still in queue, push 1. Otherwise Stun.

S_Rogue.name: Rogue
S_Rogue.description: Get 10% of your DEXTERITY as Dodge.

S_Opportunist.name: Opportunist
S_Opportunist.description: Whenever you crit, if you have Advantage, gain Initiative. Otherwise gain Advantage.

S_Gambit.name: Gambit
S_Gambit.description: Pay 20 Dodge. Receive Flawless 2, Initiative and Marked.

S_FindTheWeakness.name: Find The Weakness
S_FindTheWeakness.description: Whenever you deal Normal Damage, have a 50% chance to give Bleeding 1 and a 50% chance to give Brittle 1.

S_SmokeBomb.name: Smoke Bomb
S_SmokeBomb.description: Summon Cover 2 on your original position. Move to position.

S_Hunter.name: Hunter
S_Hunter.description: Start of Round a random enemy is Marked. Start of turn, if you claimed 5+ Marks, receive Advantage. Primary attacks can always target marked enemies.

S_TrophyHunt.name: Trophy Hunt
S_TrophyHunt.description: Claiming a Mark gives you a Trophy stack. 5+ Marks: Deal 30% more damage to Marked enemies. 10+ Marks: +30% DEXTERITY. 20+ Marks: Start of Round get an extra turn.

S_Trapper.name: Trapper
S_Trapper.description: Summon Small Trap. If the target is Marked, summon Big Trap instead.

S_ShareTheSpoils.name: Share The Spoils
S_ShareTheSpoils.description: Each round the first Mark can be claimed twice.

S_Evoker.name: Evoker
S_Evoker.description: Deal 15% more damage. Receive 10% of the Energy you pay as True Damage.

S_ChainLightning.name: Chain Lightning
S_ChainLightning.description: 25% Chance to give Burning 1. 50% during Storm.

S_Strider.name: Strider
S_Strider.description: Once per round, whenever Weather is summoned, gain an extra turn. End of Turn, if you are on a Field Effect, gain 10% Health.

S_Ambush.name: Ambush
S_Ambush.description: Move forward 1. If the target is on a Field Effect or has a Debuff, push 1.

S_Pathfinder.name: Pathfinder
S_Pathfinder.description: If you move by an ally, cool them down by 1 and Summon Cover 1.

S_TrueShot.name: True Shot
S_TrueShot.description: Receive Flawless 2. If you are on a Field Effect, gain Advantage.
